company_type: Public Safety and Enterprise Security Technology

supply_chain.dependencies: Single-source vendors for certain materials and components; reliance on global contract manufacturers; dependence on third-party suppliers for components with potential capacity constraints or insolvency risks
supply_chain.risks: Material disruption from single-source vendors; supply chain constraints; natural disasters and climate change impacts; import/export restrictions including tariffs and sanctions; supplier inability to meet demand; price increases from suppliers; reliance on third-party contract manufacturers; geopolitical conflicts affecting supply chain; forced labor compliance risks (Uyghur Forced Labor Protection Act)

regulatory_risks: Radio spectrum allocation and regulatory changes by FCC and international bodies
Telecommunications regulations for 911 services and WAVE PTX offerings in multiple jurisdictions
AI and biometrics regulations including EU AI Act, state-level AI laws (Colorado, New York), facial recognition restrictions
Biometric Information Privacy Act (Illinois) and California ALPR statute
Data privacy regulations including GDPR (EU), state privacy laws (US), data localization requirements
Cybersecurity regulations including EU NIS2 Directive
Environmental regulations including EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive, EU taxonomy initiatives
Climate change regulations and disclosure requirements
Export controls, trade restrictions, tariffs (including recent US tariffs on China, Canada, Mexico)
Anti-corruption laws (Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, UK Bribery Act)
Competition and antitrust regulations (CMA Charge Control on Airwave, EU Foreign Subsidies Regulation)
Government contract compliance (False Claims Act, Trade Agreements Act, Buy America Act, domestic content requirements)
Product safety and consumer protection regulations
Tax regulations including OECD Pillar Two Framework (15% global minimum tax)
DEI-related executive orders and federal anti-discrimination laws

sanction_risks: Retaliatory tariffs from China, Canada, Mexico and other countries
National security vulnerabilities linked to country of origin
Geopolitical conflicts including China-Taiwan conflict and Middle East conflicts
